ModMetaData.name: Ship HoloAI
ModMetaData.author: chibi
ModMetaData.description:
Your gravship comes alive. Adds the HoloCore, a gravship facility housing a shipboard AI personified as a holographic avatar who roams your decks, chats with the crew, and keeps watch over your voyage — announcing threats and ship status in her own voice, and surviving launch and landing safe inside her core.
Default persona: P.R.I.S.M. (Photonic Response Intelligence System Matrix) — calm, warm, quietly devoted. When a crewmember nears their breaking point, she finds them and simply listens.
Persona matrices, sold by exotic goods traders, install like research discs: a colonist carries one to the core, the matrix is consumed, and that persona joins the core's permanent archive — switch between archived personas any time, instantly. Each has her own voice, look, and signature ability:
- V.E.S.T.A., hearth-keeper: the ship feels like home; tucks sleeping crew in on her night rounds. - H.E.R.M.E.S., courier: everyone aboard moves faster; scrubs the decks herself, under audible protest. - A.T.H.E.N.A., scholar: research accelerates; idle crew get gathered into skill-teaching seminars that count as recreation. - A.C.E.S.O., medic: cleaner, faster medical work; answers emergencies in person when no doctor is coming. - I.X.I.A., the Crimson Warden of the Thousand-Locked Gate: runs the brig herself — recruiting, converting, suppressing, and hand-feeding prisoners — while prison breaks grow four times rarer. Maximally chuuni.
Requires the Odyssey expansion and Harmony. Ideology additionally enables slave handling, prisoner conversion, and the full avatar styling dialog; everything else works without it.
